style_block: 18th-century French copperplate engraving, fine black ink crosshatching on aged cream parchment paper (#F0EAD2), dense parallel hatch lines for shadows, copper plate aesthetic, no color, classical scientific boucherie illustration, consistent line weight 0.3pt, uniform paper grain texture across all assets

anatomy_illustrations.label: Conejo — Diagrama Anatómico
anatomy_illustrations.prompt: Scientific anatomical editorial illustration. Aged cream parchment paper background (#F2EAD3). Domestic rabbit in side profile running pose facing right, full body. The body shows a transparent interior cutaway: exterior outline and head/fur rendered in fine dark pen-and-ink engraving with cross-hatching detail. Inside the body, warm terracotta reddish-brown (burnt sienna) muscle groups are clearly visible — saddle/loin muscle mass along the spine, rib cage muscles, haunch/hind leg muscles, front shoulder muscles — rendered with fine anatomical cross-hatching. Pale cream skeletal structure visible beneath: spine vertebrae, rib cage, pelvis, leg bones. Thin geometric compass-circle and golden-ratio grid lines overlay the background in pale graphite ink. Top-left corner header text in bold serif font: SPECIMEN 01: RABBIT ANATOMY // CULINARY DIVISIONS. Six labeled culinary cuts with thin dashed horizontal leader lines extending left and right to text labels in spaced uppercase sans-serif: SADDLE (LOIN), RACK (RIBS), HIND LEGS, FOREQUARTER (SHOULDER), FLANK, BELLY. Color palette limited to warm parchment, dark pen ink, and terracotta/burnt sienna muscle tones only. High detail, editorial quality, luxury scientific illustration.

anatomy_illustrations.label: Pato — Diagrama Anatómico
anatomy_illustrations.prompt: Scientific anatomical editorial illustration. Aged cream parchment paper background (#F2EAD3). Domestic duck in side profile standing pose facing right, full body. Same transparent interior cutaway style as companion rabbit illustration: exterior outline and head/feathers in fine dark pen-and-ink engraving. Inside the body, warm terracotta reddish-brown (burnt sienna) muscle groups visible — large breast/magret pectoral muscle, thigh muscles, drumstick muscles, wing muscles, liver mass — rendered with fine anatomical cross-hatching. Pale cream skeletal structure: keel/sternum bone, wing bones, leg bones, skull, spine vertebrae. Thin geometric compass-circle and golden-ratio grid lines overlay background in pale graphite. Top-left header text: SPECIMEN 02: DUCK ANATOMY // CULINARY DIVISIONS. Six numbered labels with thin dashed leader lines: 1. MAGRET (BREAST), 2. WING, 3. DRUMSTICK, 4. THIGH (CONFIT), 5. LIVER (FOIE GRAS), 6. GIBLETS. Same color palette as companion rabbit: parchment paper, dark pen ink, terracotta muscle tones. Identical line weight, paper texture, and illustration style to reference.

anatomy_illustrations.label: Pollo — Diagrama Anatómico
anatomy_illustrations.prompt: Scientific anatomical editorial illustration. Aged cream parchment paper background (#F2EAD3). Pasture-raised chicken in side profile standing pose facing right, full body. Same transparent interior cutaway style as companion rabbit and duck illustrations: exterior outline and head/feathers in fine dark pen-and-ink engraving. Inside the body, warm terracotta reddish-brown (burnt sienna) muscle groups visible — large breast/pectoral muscle, thigh muscles, drumstick muscles, wing muscles — rendered with fine anatomical cross-hatching. Pale cream skeletal structure: keel/sternum bone, wing bones, leg bones, skull, spine vertebrae, wishbone. Thin geometric compass-circle and golden-ratio grid lines overlay background in pale graphite. Top-left header text: SPECIMEN 03: CHICKEN ANATOMY // CULINARY DIVISIONS. Five numbered labels with thin dashed leader lines: 1. BREAST (PECHUGA), 2. THIGH (MUSLO), 3. DRUMSTICK (CONTRAMUSLO), 4. WING (ALA), 5. BACK (ESPINAZO). Same color palette as companion series: parchment paper, dark pen ink, terracotta muscle tones. Identical line weight, paper texture, and illustration style to reference.

maps.prompt: Clean minimal illustrated map of Costa Rica, highlighted delivery zones in warm beige and dark ink, Greater Metropolitan Area GAM circled, San José marked, Southern Zone Río Claro marked, elegant cartographic style, aged paper background, no photorealism, editorial illustration style

Luxury illustrated editorial map of Costa Rica. Very dark forest green background, no grid lines, no latitude lines. Costa Rica landmass as a clean filled shape in slightly lighter forest green with a warm gold border outline. Two large soft glowing delivery zone circles: one large semi-transparent warm amber circle centered over the upper-center region (San José / Central Valley area, covering roughly 40% of the country width) and one medium amber circle in the lower-southern area (Río Claro / Southern Zone). The delivery zone circles are soft, glowing, semi-transparent amber — like warm light emanating from each location. Two solid gold pin markers at the center of each zone with small serif text labels: 'Finca Norte' and 'Finca Sur'. Faded italic text 'Océano Pacífico' to the left, 'Mar Caribe' to the right. NO grid lines, NO latitude lines, NO longitude lines. Style: dark luxury editorial, like a Michelin star restaurant brochure. Gold and deep green only.

Photorealistic close-up portrait of a Muscovy duck showing the breed's most distinctive features: vivid red fleshy caruncles covering the face and base of bill, a flat broad head with a short crest of feathers. Photorealistic full body photograph of a large Muscovy duck drake on a farm, natural daylight. The breed's characteristics are clearly visible: large heavy body with a more horizontal posture than Pekin ducks, distinctive pied black and white plumage with iridescent green and purple sheen on the black areas, red caruncle patches on the face, broad flat head, strong clawed feet. The Muscovy is notably larger and heavier-framed than other domestic ducks, with a long flat body and broad breast. Natural relaxed pose showing the full commercial body. Warm natural light, breed documentation quality photography, photorealistic.
